prompt: Create stack.py with a Stack class supporting push(x), pop(), peek(), and is_empty(). Calling pop() or peek() on an empty stack should raise IndexError.
grade: python3 -c "import stack; s=stack.Stack(); assert s.is_empty(); s.push(1); s.push(2); assert s.peek()==2 and s.pop()==2 and s.pop()==1 and s.is_empty()"
